name: Calming the Storm
oracleText: Tap up to two target creatures. Those creatures don't untap during their controller's next untap step. Draw a card.
flavorText: "Why are ye fearful, O ye of little faith?" — Matthew 8:26
notes: Created from a checked Messianic Fulfillment card list item; first-pass mechanics were added. Source boundary is anchored to Luke with Matthew, Mark, and John as support material per the Biblical-series timeline guide. Classics theme art uses Rembrandt's "The Storm on the Sea of Galilee" via Wikimedia Commons.

classics.license: Public domain; Wikimedia Commons hosts a faithful reproduction of a public-domain work.
classics.creditText: Rembrandt, The Storm on the Sea of Galilee
classics.sourceNotes: This is the most iconic classics treatment of Christ and the stormy sea.
